system.description: Elysium will remove the character’s inhibitions nearly completely. They are also mild sedatives, so they are typically used to aid in interrogation. A character under the effects of Elysium recovers 10 Nerve but must make a TN 4 Resolve check to refuse to perform an action or answer a question requested of him. This only applies to actions that are not obviously dangerous or against the character’s core beliefs. The effects last for 1 Quarter.
